title: Magnum Opus Relay
objective: Keep the opus core intact as the magnum mechanism accelerates, avoid incoming pistons, saw-arms, and molten drops, collect risky bonus notes for combo, and post the highest survival score on a simple local leaderboard with reactive chime-cy

controls.outcome: The opus core snaps to the next rail to dodge hazards or line up note pickups.
Move into the inner magnum rail, where hazards are denser but score multiplier builds faster.
Move back to the outer rail, lowering risk but slowing multiplier gain.

steps: Start on the middle rail of a giant magnum machine with three circular running lanes.
Hazards stream inward in repeating mechanical patterns: piston stamps, rotating cutter heads, chain hooks, and ember bursts.
Swipe left or right to move around each lane and avoid contact; one hit cracks the opus core, a second hit ends the run.
Blue opus notes appear near hazard edges. Collecting them without getting hit increases combo and restores a small amount of crack meter.
The inner magnum rail grants a rising score multiplier while occupied, but hazard density and speed are highest there.
Every 30 seconds the mechanism adds a new hazard type and the soundtrack layers in sharper metallic percussion to signal escalation.
The run ends when the core takes its final break or when the 4-minute magnum cycle completes; score is saved to a fast local leaderboard.
scoring: Score rises from survival time, hazard waves cleared, and collected opus notes. Combo increases with consecutive note pickups and near-miss dodges. Multiplier grows faster on the inner magnum rail, creating a clear risk:
tips: Stay on the outer rail early, then dive inward during readable patterns to bank multiplier.
Blue notes that sit beside pistons are the safest way to keep combo alive.
Audio matters: heavy bass clunks warn piston drops, while high chimes mark note spawns.
If the core is cracked, prioritize survival until a safe note cluster appears.

trendContext.title: Got Opus Magnum for my birthday. I can watch these mechanisms ALL DAY.
